calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Defaul Tjudgment
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Steven L. Lau, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DONGMING TOM LU.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MICHAEL FERGUSON AND DEFENDANT TRNASACTIONS UNLIMITED, INC.,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

1. Money Damages for lost revenue for 40 months: $22,760.00
2. Money Damages for lost value of the four ATM machines: $55,000.00
3. Punitive Damages: $75,000.00
4. Statutory costs under CCP 1033.5: $980.25

For a total money Judgment in the amount of: $153,740.25
Both defendat Michael Ferguson and defendant Transactions Unlimited, Inc. are held jointly and severally liable for the entire amount of said judgment. Post-judgment interest shall accrue on the unpaid balance of the judgment at the reate of 10% per annum.
Judgment signed.
